title: Oligactis valerii
taxonomy: Oligactis valerii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Oligactis, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Oligactis valerii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the class Magnoliopsida, and then the order Gentianales. Oligactis valerii is also classified as a member of the order Gentianales, within the clade Asterids. This plant is native to certain regions, but more specific details about its classification are not readily available.
